title: Realistic Product Showcase Split View Table AI
sourceTitle: Realistic Product Showcase Split View Table AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Realistic 3D split-view furniture product showcase for a modern table, built as a catalog-ready specification sheet. Subject: adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. A table is shown through precise top-down, side, and front views while the right-side material breakdown explains top thickness, leg angle, wood grain direction, steel finish, and assembly points with clean labels and texture swatches. Scene: quiet indoor window setting with clean environmental context provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Neutral light gray or white product-sheet background with subtle split background, minimal shadows, and enough negative space for readable annotations. Composition: Fixed 3:2 or 4:3 split layout: left side contains table perspectives for tabletop shape, edge, leg design, height, width, symmetry, and alignment; right side contains labeled material swatches for tabletop, legs, and frame separated by a vertical divider. Signature Elements: Preserved realistic product showcase split view table source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Realistic 3D product showcase for furniture catalog or interior design sheet, with precise geometry, believable material scale, clean sans-serif labels, and modern commercial presentation. Color Palette: Natural wood tones, matte black steel, polished oak or metal accents, grayscale background, thin divider lines, and restrained annotation colors. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Wood tabletop grain, polished oak or metal legs, matte black steel frame, close-up texture swatches, clean label callouts, and product-sheet surface realism. Typography: Modern readable section titles and labels identify top-down view, side view, front view, tabletop, legs, frame, and top thickness, leg angle, wood grain direction, steel finish, and assembly points. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
